channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Men's College Basketball Rankings: Duke, Michigan Lead the Way; Houston Falls
item.description: FOX Sports' Casey Jacobsen shares his latest men's college hoops rankings with Duke taking over the top spot after its big win over Michigan.

item.title: Report: Strong Chance George Pickens Skips Cowboys Offseason Program if Tagged
item.description: George Pickens might receive the franchise tag, but that doesn't ensure that he and the Cowboys won't have a drama-free offseason.

item.title: Seattle Sounders Pounce Past Colorado Rapids in MLS Season Opener
item.description: Paul Rothrock had a goal and an assist after replacing an injured Jordan Morris early in the first half and the Seattle Sounders beat the Colorado Rap...

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Tyler Reddick's Second Straight Win to Open 2026
item.description: Tyler Reddick spent the entire 2025 season wondering when he would win. Now he's wondering when he might lose after a second straight win to open 2026...

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Which Standout RB Has Interest In Chiefs?
item.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

item.title: Pacers star Haliburton diagnosed with shingles
item.description: Pacers point guard Tyrese Haliburton was diagnosed with shingles and will be away from the team for a few weeks, coach Rick Carlisle said Sunday.

item.title: LeBron stumps for C's Brown in MVP conversation
item.description: After Jaylen Brown fueled the Celtics' win over the Lakers on Sunday, he received an MVP endorsement from the other side of the storied rivalry.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: The SEC is the new bids leader, Wisconsin ups its 'lock' odds
item.description: The Big Ten had an edge over the SEC in projected bid count -- but Saturday's shake-ups have led to a swap.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eye Sporting CP defender, Ben White future uncertain
item.description: Ben White could leave Arsenal this summer, while Luka Modric is reportedly open to returning home to Croatia. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: How Duke, Arizona, Michigan and Houston should be ranked after Saturday
item.description: We rerank the top four teams after Duke and Arizona beat Michigan and Houston, respectively.
